nasb.text: Then I came to the exiles who lived beside the river Chebar at Tel-abib, and I sat there seven days where they were living, causing consternation among them.

esv.text: And I came to the exiles at Tel-abib, who were dwelling by the Chebar canal, and I sat where they were dwelling. And I sat there overwhelmed among them seven days.

cnv.text: 於是我來到提勒．亞畢被擄的人那裡，他們住在迦巴魯河邊。我在他們居住的地方坐了七天，在他們中間震驚得不知所措。

ccb.text: 我来到住在提勒·亚毕的被掳的人中，在迦巴鲁河边。我感到无比震惊，在他们中间坐了七天。
